title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Cardiovascular Devices - November 24, 2017 Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Cardiovascular Devices - November 24, 2017 Agenda
Location: 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048 Date & time: November 24 2017, 7:30 to 4:00
Chairperson: Dr. John Ducas Science Advisor: Hripsime Shahbazian Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, Guest Speakers, Health Canada employees
Review of the Agenda, Declaration of Affiliations and Interests Dr. Pat Stewart, (DGO, TPD) & Dr. John Ducas (SAC-MDUCS Chair)
Review of Terms of Reference, Membership and members Affiliations and Interests Mrs. Hripsime Shahbazian (Office of Science, TPD)
Summary of how information from previous meeting is being used Mr. Kevin Day (Medical Devices Bureau, TPD)
Question 1: Update on remote (robotic) navigation for ablation and other aspect of the treatment of AF (and other arrhythmias) Presenter: Dr. Yaariv Khaykin
Question 2: Update for the Renal Denervation Systems for the treatment of hypertension Presenter: Dr. Ruzicka
Question 3: Home Monitoring in Canada Presenter: Dr. Ratika Parkash
Question 4: Ventricular Assist Devices Presenter: Dr. Renzo Cecere
Question 5: Use of Cardiac Implantable Electrical Devices (CIEDs) used in an MRI setting Discussion lead: Dr. Yee with contributions from Dr. Parkash and Dr. Mitchell
Question 6: Atrial Shunt/Flow Devices for the Treatment of Heart Failure Presenter: Dr. Mathieu Bernier
Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Committee Chair: Dr. John Ducas
